problem.pain1Desc: Sales teams waste 60% of their time on low-value manual tasks.
problem.pain2Desc: Generic messages generate less than 2% response rates — your prospects deserve better.
problem.pain3Desc: Contact research, copy-paste emails, approximate follow-ups — it's unsustainable.

services.sectionSubtitle: Solutions tailored to every stage of your growth
services.tier1Desc: Analysis of your current pipeline, ICP definition, AI tool configuration, and team training.
services.tier2Desc: Full service: scraping, enrichment, multichannel outreach, and reporting — we handle everything.
services.tier3Desc: Intelligent chatbot for your website — automatic visitor qualification and appointment booking.
services.tier4Desc: Performance model: reduced fixed fee + commission per qualified lead. No results, no invoice.

howItWorks.sectionSubtitle: A fully automated pipeline, from research to closing
howItWorks.step1Desc: Prospect identification based on your ICP via Apollo.io and B2B databases.
howItWorks.step2Desc: AI analysis of each prospect: relevance score, company data, buying signals.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Automatic contextual message generation powered by Claude AI.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Automated email + LinkedIn sequences via Instantly.ai with smart follow-ups.
howItWorks.step5Desc: AI analyzes responses and prioritizes hot leads for your team.
howItWorks.step6Desc: Real-time dashboard: KPIs, pipeline, ROI — total visibility.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How long until I see results?
faq.a1: First leads typically arrive within 2 to 4 weeks after setup. The pipeline reaches cruising speed after 6 to 8 weeks.
faq.a2: Our stack includes Apollo.io for scraping, Instantly.ai for outreach, Claude AI for personalization, n8n for orchestration, and HubSpot for CRM.
faq.q3: Does this work for my industry?
faq.a3: We work with B2B SMEs in tech, professional services, consulting, and finance. If your ideal client is identifiable online, it will work.
faq.q4: How is this different from a traditional SDR?
faq.a4: An SDR handles 50-100 prospects per day. Our system handles 1,000+ with superior personalization at 3-5x lower cost.
faq.a5: Absolutely. All data is hosted on Supabase (AWS EU infrastructure), GDPR compliant. You retain 100% ownership of your data.
faq.a6: Yes, all contracts have no minimum commitment beyond the first month. Cancel with 30 days notice.
faq.q7: Do you offer a free trial?
faq.a7: We offer a free 30-minute audit to evaluate your current pipeline and show you the potential. No commitment.
faq.a8: Real-time dashboard with clear metrics: CPL (cost per lead), conversion rate, pipeline value, and overall ROI. Total transparency.

pricing.ctaSubtitle: A free 30-minute audit to define your strategy

about.storyP1: After 24 years in IT Operations — from Bloomberg to EMEA infrastructure — I've seen firsthand how technology transforms businesses. But I've also seen a recurring problem: SMEs don't have access to the same tools as large corporations.
about.storyP2: LeadForge AI was born from this conviction: AI can democratize B2B prospecting. Not empty volume. Qualified leads, personalized, delivered with transparency.
about.missionDesc: We build AI prospecting systems that generate qualified leads for European SMEs — with enterprise ops rigor and real-time dashboard transparency.
about.philosophy1Desc: Every workflow is designed around AI — it's not an afterthought.
about.philosophy2Desc: Real-time dashboard. You see everything: every action, every euro spent.
about.philosophy3Desc: Clear metrics, measurable ROI. No vanity metrics.
